name: Credo
source: crunchbase.com/organization/getcredo; getcredo.com Instagram geo-tag Denver CO
notes: Credo (getcredo.com) is a B2B marketplace connecting businesses with vetted digital marketing firms. Founded 2013, HQ Denver CO. Multiple Credo companies exist on Crunchbase; matched to getcredo.com based on search results.

name: Home
